questions.question: A music composer uses a function $f(x) = 3x + 2$ to create rhythm patterns. Which of the following is the inverse function?
The frequency of a sound wave is given by $f(x) = 2x^2 + 1$. Does this function have an inverse?

options.A: Yes, it has a unique inverse
options.B: No, it does not have an inverse
options.C: Maybe, it depends on the domain
options.D: Only for positive values of x
options.E: Only for negative values of x

questions.question: An art canvas has a width given by $f(x) = x^2 - 4$. Find the inverse function.
The duration of a music piece is given by $f(x) = \frac{1}{x}$. Verify if $f^{-1}(x) = \frac{1}{x}$ is the inverse function using composition.

options.B: No, it is not the inverse
options.C: Maybe, it depends on the domain
options.D: Only for positive values of x
options.E: Only for negative values of x

questions.question: A painter uses a function $f(x) = x^3 - 1$ to create unique patterns. Find the inverse function.
A musician uses a function $f(x) = \frac{1}{x-1}$ to create sound effects. Does this function have an inverse?

options.A: Yes, it has a unique inverse
options.B: No, it does not have an inverse
options.C: Maybe, it depends on the domain
options.D: Only for positive values of x
options.E: Only for negative values of x

questions.question: An artist uses a function $f(x) = 2x - 5$ to create unique designs. Find the inverse function.
A sound engineer uses a function $f(x) = x^2$ to adjust sound levels. Does this function have an inverse?

options.A: Yes, it has a unique inverse
options.B: No, it does not have an inverse
options.C: Maybe, it depends on the domain
options.D: Only for positive values of x
options.E: Only for negative values of x

questions.question: A music composer uses a function $f(x) = 2x^2 + 3x - 1$ to create rhythm patterns. Find the inverse function and verify it using composition. Show all your work.
An artist uses a function $f(x) = x^3 - 2x^2 - 5x + 1$ to create unique designs. Determine if this function has an inverse and explain your reasoning. Show all your work.

teacher_rules: Tip 1: Remind students to check their work carefully
Tip 2: Encourage students to use graphing calculators to visualize the functions
Tip 3: Emphasize the importance of showing all work and explanations for free response questions
